elf.cocoa: You carry the quiet grace of Rivendell in everything you do — unhurried, deliberate, and deeply attuned to beauty. Like Elrond himself, you have a gift for making others feel safe and seen, which means your romantic partners tend to lean on you perhaps a little more than is strictly fair. Professionally, you excel anywhere that rewards patience and craft: restoration work, archival research, bespoke anything. Your evening ritual of a warm cocoa is not indulgence — it is ceremony, and you would not have it any other way.
elf.cocoa with marshmallows: There is a reason the elves of Lothlórien wove starlight into their cloaks — they understood that beauty is always improved by one more small, perfect thing. You are that person: the one who shows up with flowers when a text would have done, who genuinely notices when someone has rearranged the furniture. Romantically you are devoted and a touch idealistic, which is mostly wonderful. In your career you thrive in creative direction or product design, because you instinctively know when something is almost right and needs just one more marshmallow.
elf.broth: You have the long-horizon thinking of Galadriel and the quiet practicality of someone who has watched empires rise and fall and still remembered to pack a good meal. You are the friend who shows up with soup before anyone admits they are struggling, and your partners will spend years trying to figure out how you always know. In work you gravitate toward healing professions, coaching, or any role where the real product is someone else's wellbeing. Your idea of a wild Friday night is a clean kitchen and a warm mug, and honestly, no one who truly knows you would argue with that.
elf.black coffee: You have the piercing focus of Legolas mid-battle and the social confidence of someone who has simply been around long enough to stop worrying about what the room thinks. Black coffee says you want the thing itself, not the softened version, and that ruthless clarity follows you into relationships — you say what you mean, and you expect the same back. Professionally you are formidable in strategy, law, or any field that rewards seeing three moves ahead. Your partners find you magnetic and occasionally exhausting, which you consider a reasonable trade.
elf.caffe latte: You move through the world with the effortless elegance of an elf of the First Age who also happens to know the best café in every city. You are a connector — the person who remembers everyone's order, who makes introductions that somehow always pan out, who turns a work meeting into something people actually look forward to. Romantically you lead with warmth and a certain artful attention to detail that your partners find quietly irresistible. Your professional sweet spot is anywhere culture and commerce overlap: hospitality, brand strategy, the arts.
elf.hot water: You have the serene self-possession of Círdan the Shipwright — content, unhurried, and quietly certain of things others are still arguing about. Choosing hot water is a statement of radical simplicity, and it signals that you have already done the interior work most people are still avoiding. Your romantic partners tend to be drawn to your stillness, that rare sense that you are genuinely present rather than halfway elsewhere. Professionally you are the person everyone wants in the room during a crisis, because you are the one who will not panic.

wizard.cocoa: You carry the warm, rumpled wisdom of Gandalf the Grey — approachable on the surface, bottomless underneath. Like a wizard who arrives precisely when he means to, you have a gift for timing: the right word, the right gesture, the right moment to produce a cocoa and simply sit with someone in their difficulty. Your romantic partners adore you for your depth and occasionally want to shake you for your inscrutability. In work you are the mentor, the strategist, the person who has somehow already read the memo everyone else just received.
wizard.cocoa with marshmallows: Gandalf brought fireworks to the Shire because he understood that wisdom without delight is just a long lecture. You are the wizard who never forgot how to play — your cocoa has marshmallows, your meetings have laughter, and your approach to any problem has at least one elegant flourish that nobody else would have thought of. Romantically you attract people who want to feel like the world is a little larger and stranger than it seemed before they met you. Professionally you belong anywhere that values imagination backed by genuine expertise.
wizard.broth: There is a reason Gandalf spent so much time in kitchens and taverns — real intelligence is fed by real warmth, and you have always known that. Chicken broth is the choice of someone who understands that restoration is its own kind of power, and you bring that same restorative energy to your relationships and your work. You are the colleague who checks in after a hard week, the partner who notices the small signs before they become big ones. People trust you instinctively, which is a gift you do not take lightly.
wizard.black coffee: You have the bracing intensity of Gandalf the White — cleaner, sharper, and considerably less patient with nonsense than you used to be. Black coffee is a declaration of intent, and so are you: you know what you are here for, and you would rather spend your energy on the thing than on packaging it attractively. Romantically you draw people who want to be challenged and grown, though you have learned (slowly) that not every conversation is a seminar. Professionally you are at your best leading transformations, turning around failing projects, or doing the work that requires someone to simply tell the truth.
wizard.caffe latte: You are the wizard who has walked in every world — learned, curious, and at ease in both the great library and the corner café. A latte takes craft and care, and so does the way you move through relationships: you are attentive, expressive, and genuinely interested in the texture of other people's inner lives. Gandalf had a long memory for both sorrow and joy, and you do too — it gives your company a particular richness that your partners and colleagues return to again and again. Your professional gifts lie in translation: making the complex accessible, the abstract tangible.
wizard.hot water: Hot water is the oldest magic — it requires nothing added and changes everything it touches. You have the Istari's long patience and a philosopher's comfort with uncertainty, and you have long since stopped needing external confirmation that you are on the right path. Your romantic relationships are slow to start and built to last; you are not interested in anyone who cannot sit quietly with you for a while. Professionally you are the person institutions call when they have run out of conventional answers, because you are willing to start from first principles.

ring wraith.cocoa: Even the Nazgûl, servants of the Dark Lord, once walked in sunlight — and somewhere under that shroud, something still reaches for warmth. You are a person of tremendous intensity and loyalty, the kind that reshapes everything around it, and the cocoa is the tell: you want comfort even if you will not always admit it. Romantically you are all-in, perhaps in ways that surprise people who only saw the exterior, and your partners find that hidden tenderness completely disarming. Professionally your relentless focus makes you exceptional at long-horizon, high-stakes work — the kind where others give up and you simply do not.
ring wraith.cocoa with marshmallows: There is something quietly radical about a wraith with marshmallows — it says that the darkness does not get to have everything. You are someone who has walked through genuinely hard things and chosen, deliberately, to preserve the capacity for small joys, which is actually a form of defiance your friends and partners find quietly inspiring. Romantically you are fiercely devoted and somewhat protective, which lands beautifully once trust is established. In your career you excel in any field that requires both relentlessness and the occasional unexpected warmth — crisis communications, emergency medicine, the law.
ring wraith.broth: The Ringwraiths were once great kings, and greatness of that order always carries a long memory — including the memory of what it meant to be cared for. Chicken broth is an act of self-preservation dressed as simplicity, and you are someone who has learned, perhaps the hard way, that you cannot pour from an empty cup. Romantically you are deeply capable of nurturing, and your partners are often surprised by the gentleness that lives alongside your intensity. Professionally you are drawn to work that carries weight: medicine, law, chaplaincy, anything where the stakes are real.
ring wraith.black coffee: You are the Black Rider who rides without apology — focused to the point of being unsettling, relentless in a way that lesser people mistake for severity. Black coffee is the drink of someone who has no interest in softening the signal, and your directness in relationships and at work is either a gift or a challenge depending on whether the other person can keep up. Romantically you attract equals — people with their own strong center, who find your intensity clarifying rather than consuming. Professionally you are built for leadership in conditions that would scatter anyone less certain of their direction.
ring wraith.caffe latte: Even nine wraiths have nine different personalities, and you are clearly the one who found the espresso bar. You have a wraith's relentless drive and a latte drinker's genuine appreciation for craft and ritual, and the combination produces someone who pursues excellence with a warmth that catches people off guard. Romantically you are attentive and surprisingly thoughtful — you remember the small things that others forget, and your partners feel genuinely seen by you. Your professional gifts are in leadership roles where culture matters: you know how to hold people to a high standard without making them feel small.
ring wraith.hot water: Hot water from a vending machine, chosen by someone drawn to the ring wraith — this is the choice of a person who understands that power does not need to announce itself. You are spare, deliberate, and completely uninterested in performing for anyone's benefit, which gives you an authority that is difficult to explain and nearly impossible to ignore. Romantically you are selective and slow to open, but your partners who earn that trust find a depth of loyalty that is almost archaeological in its layers. Professionally you are the quiet force in any room — the one who says the least and is listened to most.

orc/uruk-hai.cocoa: You carry the raw intensity of Saruman's finest Uruk-hai, but beneath that iron exterior beats a heart that craves genuine warmth — which is exactly why you reached for the cocoa. You are the person in the office who seems terrifying at first but turns out to be the most loyal teammate anyone could ask for; once you're on someone's side, you are on it forever. Romantically, you attract partners who appreciate someone who is direct, protective, and will absolutely not tolerate nonsense on their behalf. Your daily ritual of carving out small comforts amid the chaos — a warm mug, a moment of quiet — is what keeps you formidable and surprisingly well-adjusted.
orc/uruk-hai.cocoa with marshmallows: The armies of Isengard were bred for relentless purpose, but you went ahead and added marshmallows, which means you contain multitudes and you are not even slightly apologetic about it. You bring the same ferocious commitment to everything you do — projects, friendships, your elaborate hot-drink ritual — and the people around you find that energy both thrilling and oddly comforting. Your ideal partner is someone who can match your passion without trying to sand down your edges, and in return you will champion them with a ferocity that would make even Lurtz take note. Professionally, you are the one who gets the impossible thing done and then quietly celebrates with something that has tiny floating pillows in it.
orc/uruk-hai.broth: There is a no-nonsense practicality to you that would have fit right in among the Uruk-hai scouts of Isengard — you do not reach for sweetness or ceremony, you reach for what actually sustains you. Chicken broth is the drink of someone who has seen things, done things, and understands that real nourishment is rarely flashy. In love, you are the partner who shows up with soup when your person is sick, who remembers the practical details everyone else forgets, and who expresses care through action rather than poetry. Colleagues rely on you as the clear-eyed realist who can cut through dramatics and get the unit moving again.
orc/uruk-hai.black coffee: You share the unflinching, stripped-down intensity of the Uruk-hai — no frills, no apologies, maximum output — and black coffee is basically your battle standard. You are the person who arrives early, leaves late, and somehow still has the most energy in any room, which baffles and slightly intimidates everyone who doesn't know you well. Romantically, you need a partner who respects your drive and doesn't mistake your efficiency for coldness, because underneath the no-nonsense exterior you are deeply committed to the people you choose. Your professional superpower is that you can be trusted to deliver under conditions that would make others reach for something much stronger than coffee.
orc/uruk-hai.caffe latte: The Uruk-hai were built for conquest, but you have the rare self-awareness to know that conquest goes better when you've had something smooth and well-crafted first — and honestly, that perspective puts you ahead of most people. You bring a bold, structured ambition to everything you do, but the milk softens the edges just enough that people actually enjoy working with you, which is more than can be said for most of Saruman's lieutenants. Your romantic partners tend to admire your confidence and find the contrast between your fierce exterior and your quietly refined taste genuinely intriguing. You are the person who built the thing everyone said couldn't be built, and you did it with good posture and a properly textured foam top.
orc/uruk-hai.hot water: There is something deeply deliberate about you — like the Uruk-hai who moves in silence before the battle, you strip everything back to essentials and find the power in simplicity. Hot water asks nothing of you and gives you space to think, and that reflects a personality that is self-sufficient, unhurried in its own private moments, and not interested in performing comfort for anyone else's benefit. In relationships, you are steady and unpretentious; you won't make grand gestures but you will be exactly who you said you'd be, every single time, which is rarer and more valuable than most people realize. Professionally, you are the calm in the storm — the one everyone looks to when the plan falls apart, because you have already figured out the next move.

hobbit.cocoa: You are, at your core, a Shire-dweller in the very best sense: you believe deeply that the right drink in the right chair at the right time is one of the great achievements of civilization, and cocoa is your proof. Like Bilbo settling in at Bag End after an unexpected adventure, you have an extraordinary capacity for turning any space into somewhere worth lingering, and the people around you feel that warmth immediately. Romantically, you are the partner who makes ordinary Tuesday evenings feel like something to look forward to — second breakfast is always better with you — and you attract people who finally feel at home around you. Your professional strength is an underestimated tenacity: Frodo looked like he was just enjoying the Shire too, and look how that turned out.
hobbit.cocoa with marshmallows: If the hobbits of the Shire had a patron saint of cozy abundance, it would be you — you chose the cocoa and then you improved it, because why wouldn't you, and that instinct defines you entirely. You are generous, imaginative, and have an almost magical ability to find the delightful option that everyone else walked right past, which makes you an extraordinary friend and a genuinely fun partner to have. Romantically, you are the one who plans the sweet surprise, remembers the small preferences, and turns a regular evening into something that will be talked about fondly for years — very much in the tradition of a good Hobbiton party. Professionally, you bring creativity and warmth to every team you join, and people follow your lead because being around you simply feels good.
hobbit.broth: You have the hobbit's deep love of home and hearth, but your version of comfort is built on something genuinely nourishing rather than merely sweet — you are the Samwise of your friend group, the one who packed the cooking gear and knew it would matter. There is a practical wisdom in you that people underestimate at first, right up until they realize you were the one who kept everyone fed, grounded, and moving forward when the journey got hard. In love, you are devoted and attentive in the most tangible ways — you notice when someone needs warmth before they say so, and you provide it without making a production of it. Your daily habits are a model of quiet excellence: unpretentious, sustaining, and more thoughtful than they appear.
hobbit.black coffee: You are the unexpected hobbit — the one who slips out the round green door before dawn while everyone else is still debating second breakfast, because you have things to accomplish and you're already three steps ahead. Black coffee suits the part of you that people rarely see coming: a focused, surprisingly fierce drive tucked neatly inside an approachable exterior, much like the Took family's tendency to go on adventures despite everyone expecting them to stay home. Romantically, you are deeply loyal and warm, but you need a partner who can keep up with you on your better days and appreciates that you contain more complexity than your cheerful demeanor suggests. In the workplace, you are the one who quietly delivers something remarkable and then suggests lunch, because balance matters.
hobbit.caffe latte: You have the hobbit gift for pleasure and good company, and the latte is your tell: you appreciate craft, you enjoy the ritual, and you have probably strong opinions about things that matter to no one outside your immediate circle, and that is entirely correct. Like Pippin at the Green Dragon, you are the social glue — the one who makes everyone feel included, who knows how to read a room, and whose presence genuinely improves any gathering. Your romantic partners adore how easy you are to be with while also discovering, over time, that there are unexpected depths — you are a Shire with secret tunnels, if you like. Professionally, you are the collaborator everyone wants: creative, consistent, and capable of making even difficult work feel like something you're all doing together.
hobbit.hot water: There is a meditative stillness to you that runs deeper than most people expect from someone with the hobbit's outward cheerfulness — hot water, like the Shire itself, looks simple until you sit with it long enough to understand its richness. You are the person who needs no embellishment to be content, who finds satisfaction in the clean, the quiet, and the unhurried, and whose company has a way of slowing others down in the best possible way. In relationships, you offer a kind of presence that is genuinely rare: you are fully there, not distracted, not performing — just warmly, steadily yourself, which is more than enough. Professionally, your clarity of mind and ability to find signal in the noise make you the person everyone wants to think through a problem with.

dwarf.cocoa: You carry the Dwarven love of deep-crafted things and loyal fellowship, and cocoa is your version of a fire in the halls of Erebor — a rich, deliberate warmth that you do not share carelessly but that means everything when you do. Like Gimli discovering the beauty of the Glittering Caves, you have an artist's soul beneath the practical exterior, and the people lucky enough to get close to you find something genuinely magnificent. In love, you are steadfast and generous to a fault — a Dwarven oath means something, and so do your commitments — and you attract partners who value loyalty and depth over novelty. Your professional strength is your ability to work with relentless craft and care, to treat every task as something worth doing properly, which in a world of shortcuts makes you extraordinary.
dwarf.cocoa with marshmallows: You are a Dwarf with a poet's heart and zero shame about it, which is the exact energy that made Thorin's company such an improbable, wonderful group of companions. The marshmallows are your flourish — the unexpected detail that reveals you have a love of abundance and delight running right alongside your famous Dwarven tenacity. Romantically, you are the partner who holds the door open and also planned the entire evening, who is both the most reliable person in the room and the most likely to suggest something slightly ridiculous and fun. In the workplace, you are the master craftsperson who also keeps a jar of good things on the desk, because excellence and joy are not opposites and you have always known that.
dwarf.broth: You have the Dwarf's bone-deep practicality and the long memory of a people who have survived mountain winters, dragon fire, and the Battle of Five Armies, which means you know exactly what actually sustains a person when the road gets long. Chicken broth is your kind of drink: honest, restorative, without pretension — the kind of thing Glóin would have packed for a serious march. In relationships, you are the dependable anchor; you will not write sonnets, but you will be there, reliably and completely, in the ways that matter most over a lifetime. Colleagues value you as the person who cuts through the noise and identifies the one thing that needs to happen, and then makes it happen, because Dwarves do not have time for anything else.
dwarf.black coffee: Forged in the deep places of the world, hardened by tradition and purpose, you and black coffee are a natural pairing — both are intense, both are an acquired taste, and both are secretly what the whole operation depends on. You have the Dwarven gift for endurance: you will outlast the problem, the deadline, the detractors, and possibly the mountain itself, and you will not require sympathy along the way. Romantically, you are formidably loyal and slow to open up, but when you do, your partner discovers a depth of feeling that rivals anything Tolkien put in the appendices, and they tend not to leave after that. Professionally, you are the load-bearing wall: not always the most visible, but the one that everything else is built around.
dwarf.caffe latte: There is more to you than the stereotype suggests — like the Dwarves of Erebor who were master jewelers as well as warriors, you have a cultivated taste that surprises people who expected you to be purely about function. The latte is your signal that you understand the value of something made well, with skill and care and the right materials, which is, when you think about it, the most Dwarven possible take on a coffee drink. In relationships, you bring both groundedness and a genuine appreciation for beauty — you notice the detail, you remember the preference, and you put in the craft that makes a partnership last. Your professional reputation is built on quality that speaks for itself: you do not need to announce what you've made, because the work already does.
dwarf.hot water: You are a Dwarf in the truest tradition — self-sufficient, unhurried by fashion, and quietly skeptical of anything that asks you to need more than you actually need. Hot water is the mountain itself: ancient, essential, stripped of ornament, and more powerful than it looks. There is an austerity to your character that others sometimes mistake for coldness, until they realize it is actually discipline — a deep-rooted sense of what matters that was forged long before the current moment and will outlast it. In love and at work alike, you are the person everyone realizes, eventually, they were lucky to have: not the loudest in the room, but the one the room was built around.

ent.cocoa: You are ancient, warm, and deeply rooted — like Treebeard settling in for a long evening in Fangorn Forest, you take your time and mean every word you say. You don't rush into anything, least of all relationships, but when you finally open up, your loyalty runs deeper than any root system in Middle-earth. In your professional life you are the steady anchor everyone counts on: the one who remembers how things were done three reorganizations ago and was right all along. Your ideal partner is someone who appreciates slow mornings, old trees, and the fact that good things — like you — cannot be hurried.
ent.cocoa with marshmallows: You have the gravitas of an Ent who has watched empires rise and fall, and yet you never lost your capacity for delight — those marshmallows are proof. Like the march of the Ents on Isengard, you are unstoppable once you've made up your mind, but you arrive with a surprising gentleness that catches everyone off guard. You bring that same energy to your work and your relationships: serious about what matters, playful about the rest. Partners find you irresistible precisely because you are both ancient-soul wise and secretly, wonderfully whimsical.
ent.broth: You are elemental and nourishing, the kind of presence that makes people feel steadier just by being in the room — much like the ancient waters that feed the roots of Fangorn. Where others reach for sweetness or stimulation, you understand that the most sustaining things are also the most humble, and your friends and colleagues quietly rely on you for exactly that quality. In love you are a caretaker, deeply attentive to what your partner actually needs rather than what looks impressive. Your lifestyle is unhurried and intentional: you are the person who makes soup from scratch, tends a garden, and genuinely means it when you ask how someone is doing.
ent.black coffee: You carry centuries of quiet observation behind your eyes, and like the darkest, most unadorned brew, you offer no pretense and require none in return. Treebeard himself would recognize you as a kindred spirit: someone who has seen enough of the world to know that clarity and patience accomplish more than noise ever will. Professionally you cut straight to what matters and have little tolerance for meetings that could have been a letter — or, in your case, a slow, deliberate speech that says everything necessary and nothing more. The partner who wins your heart will be someone equally unhurried and unbothered by silence, because with you, silence is never empty.
ent.caffe latte: You are proof that an ancient soul can also be a sophisticated one — you've watched the ages turn, and somewhere along the way you developed genuinely excellent taste. Like an Ent who has learned to appreciate the finer craftsmanship of the Elves, you blend timeless depth with a refined, contemporary sensibility that surprises people who expected something purely rustic. In your career you are the rare person who can hold the long view and still care about the quality of today's work, which makes you invaluable in any room. Romantically you attract partners who want substance and style in equal measure, and you deliver both without even trying.
ent.hot water: You are the most elemental of all: pure, unhurried, and needing nothing added to be exactly what you are — an Ent who has been standing in the same forest since before the Dwarves woke in the mountains. There is a meditative quality to you that others find both humbling and quietly magnetic; you don't chase trends, opinions, or approval, and that stillness draws people toward you like animals to a still pool. In your work and your relationships you are the person who strips every problem down to its simplest, truest form, and the answer is almost always obvious once you do. Your ideal day involves very little noise and a great deal of sky.

human.cocoa: You are the Aragorn of your friend group — capable of great things, genuinely humble about it, and always ready with warmth and a good story by the fire. Cocoa on a cold rink night says you believe in comfort as a form of courage, and you build the same kind of haven in your relationships: steady, enveloping, and deeply reliable. Professionally you have range — you can rally a fellowship or quietly get the work done alone — but your real gift is making other people feel like they belong. Your partner gets someone who remembers the cold and always, always has something warm waiting.
human.cocoa with marshmallows: You have the heart of a Hobbit even though you are fully, beautifully human — you know that a little extra sweetness is not indulgence, it is wisdom. Like the hobbits of the Shire who kept the spirit of Middle-earth alive through sheer good-heartedness, you are the person who makes ordinary moments feel like small celebrations. In your professional life you are the culture-carrier: the one who remembers birthdays, suggests the team lunch, and somehow always has something cheerful to say without being insufferable about it. Romantically you are magnetic to people who have been taking life too seriously and are ready, at last, to enjoy it.
human.broth: You are the quiet backbone of every group you've ever been part of — practical, genuinely caring, and far more essential than you are given credit for, much like the Rangers of the North who kept the peace while no one was watching. Chicken broth is the choice of someone who understands that real nourishment is rarely flashy, and you apply that same no-nonsense generosity to your friendships, your work, and your love life. You are the person colleagues call when something actually needs to get done, and the partner who shows up with soup before anyone thinks to ask. Your strength is quiet and your loyalty is absolute.
human.black coffee: You are built for long campaigns and hard truths, the kind of human who would have ridden to the Black Gate not because the odds were good but because it was the right thing to do. Black coffee is your drink because you have neither the time nor the inclination for anything that softens the edges of reality — you'd rather see clearly and act decisively. In your career you thrive under pressure and earn respect the hard way, through competence and follow-through rather than charm. The person lucky enough to be your partner gets unwavering honesty and a love that is offered seriously, not casually.
human.caffe latte: You carry yourself with the easy confidence of someone who has figured out that life is better when you invest in the good version of things — not extravagantly, just thoughtfully, the way a skilled craftsman of Gondor would choose quality materials without making a fuss about it. You move fluidly between ambition and ease, which makes you excellent company and an even better colleague, because you know how to work hard without making everyone around you miserable. Romantically you are the one who plans the perfect evening without it ever feeling like effort, because for you it genuinely isn't. Partners find you aspirational without being intimidating, which is a rare and wonderful combination.
human.hot water: There is a philosophical streak in you that runs deeper than it first appears — like Faramir among the humans of Gondor, you are not always what people expect, and that is entirely to your advantage. Hot water on a cold night is the choice of someone who finds sufficiency in simplicity, and you have a gift for extracting meaning from moments that others walk right past. In your work you are the clear thinker, unburdened by noise, which makes your instincts unusually reliable. Your partner will be someone who values depth over dazzle and feels genuinely seen by you, because you pay attention to the things that actually matter.

gollum.cocoa: There is a sweetness in you that has survived everything — and that, honestly, is remarkable. Like Sméagol before the Ring found him, you have a tender, earnest core that keeps surfacing no matter how many times life has tried to bury it, and cocoa is the proof: you still choose warmth, you still choose pleasure, you still choose small joys. In love you are unexpectedly devoted, the kind of partner who fixates (in the best possible way) on the person they care about, noticing every detail and remembering everything. Professionally your intensity makes you relentless at whatever you set your mind to — and when that mind is pointed at something good, the results are extraordinary.
gollum.cocoa with marshmallows: You understand, on a cellular level, that some things are precious — and marshmallows in cocoa are one of them, and there is nothing wrong with that, and anyone who says otherwise is probably just jealous. Like Gollum cradling the Ring, you love the things you love completely and without apology, which is actually a beautiful quality when directed at the right objects (which, in your case, increasingly it is). You are the person who has strong opinions about the correct way to do everything, and who is usually right, and who your friends secretly consult before making any important decision. Your ideal partner matches your passion with their own and never makes you feel like too much.
gollum.broth: You have been through it — genuinely, seriously through it — and you emerged with a bone-deep appreciation for the simple things that actually sustain you. Chicken broth is the choice of someone who has wandered dark places and come out the other side knowing exactly what warmth and nourishment mean, which gives you an emotional intelligence that the comfortable never quite develop. Like Gollum navigating the paths no one else could find, you possess an uncanny ability to move through complicated situations and come out with exactly what you went in for. Your partner gets someone who never takes warmth for granted and gives it back with everything they have.
gollum.black coffee: You are singular, intense, and operating on a frequency that most people can't quite tune into — like Gollum slipping through the shadows of Moria in ways the Fellowship could only marvel at, you find paths and angles others simply don't see. Black coffee is the fuel of someone who has no patience for dilution or distraction, who is here for the thing itself and not the atmosphere around it. In your professional life your focus is almost unnervingly sharp, and when you care about a project it becomes something of an obsession — the productive kind that produces genuinely impressive results. The partner you need is someone secure enough to be adored intensely and wise enough to adore you right back.
gollum.caffe latte: You contain multitudes, and don't let anyone convince you otherwise — somewhere between the Sméagol who loved fishing in the Gladden Fields and the Gollum who survived centuries of impossible odds lives a personality of real complexity, and the caffe latte confirms it: you like things done well, with a little artistry, thank you very much. You are the person at work who insists on the better solution when everyone else would have accepted the adequate one, which occasionally makes you difficult and consistently makes the outcome better. In relationships you are passionate, perceptive, and intensely loyal to whoever earns your trust — which is not given lightly and is worth the wait. Your partner will feel more understood by you than by anyone they've ever met.
gollum.hot water: You are the purist, the survivor, the one who has been stripped of everything nonessential and discovered that what remains is actually enough — which is a kind of wisdom that takes most people a lifetime and several dramatic plot arcs to reach. Like Gollum enduring centuries in the dark caves beneath the Misty Mountains, you have an adaptability and resilience that are genuinely staggering, and you don't make a big deal out of it, which makes it even more impressive. Hot water is the drink of radical simplicity, and you have earned that simplicity through experience rather than chose it through inexperience. Your perfect partner sees the strength in your stillness and the story behind your calm.

dragon.cocoa: You are the Smaug of the social calendar — magnificent, commanding, and secretly craving warmth beneath that fearsome exterior. Like the Lonely Mountain's most famous resident, you have exquisite taste and a talent for accumulating beautiful things, but cocoa reveals the cozy soul hiding under all that scale and fire. In romance, you are fiercely loyal and intensely passionate; your partner will feel like the most treasured item in your hoard. Professionally, you thrive in leadership roles where your vision and authority set the tone for everyone else in the room.
dragon.cocoa with marshmallows: You carry the grandeur of Ancalagon the Black in your ambitions but the whimsy of a Shire hobbit in your heart — and those marshmallows are the proof. You lead with drama and flair, but your inner circle knows you as the one who remembers birthdays, brings the good snacks, and makes even the bleakest quest feel festive. Partners find you irresistible precisely because you balance intensity with unexpected tenderness. At work, you are the visionary who somehow also remembers to order the birthday cake.
dragon.broth: Dragon and chicken broth: the quiet power combination that nobody sees coming, much like Glaurung's subtle mind-breaking curse — understated on the surface, devastatingly effective underneath. You are a nurturer at your core, the kind of person who shows love through practical care rather than grand gestures, even as your presence fills the room like smoke from a mountain vent. In relationships, you are the steady, sustaining force your partner didn't know they needed. Professionally, you are the strategist who wins through patience and foresight rather than brute force.
dragon.black coffee: You are Smaug without the small talk — pure fire, zero filler, and absolutely no time for anything that does not serve your purpose. Like the dragon who memorised every cup and trinket in his hoard, you have a mind for detail that most people mistake for obsession until they see the results. Romantically, you attract partners who are drawn to intensity and can hold their own in a battle of wits. In your career, you are the person everyone calls when the situation is dire and a clear head is the only weapon that matters.
dragon.caffe latte: You have Smaug's confidence and Bilbo's appreciation for the finer things, which means you enter every room like you own it and then immediately find the best seat with the best view. The latte signals that you want your power with a little silk lining — you demand excellence but you also know how to enjoy the rewards of it. In love, you are a devoted and generous partner who brings both passion and good taste to the relationship. Professionally, you gravitate toward roles that mix creative authority with visible prestige, and you perform beautifully in both.
dragon.hot water: There is a meditative stillness to you that belies the volcanic potential underneath, like a dormant fire-drake resting on the Withered Heath, biding its time. Hot water is the choice of someone who needs no embellishment — you are confident enough in your own essence to require no additions. In romance, you are the partner who grounds everyone around you without ever losing your own magnetic edge. At work, your colleagues learn quickly that the quietest person in the meeting is usually the one whose opinion reshapes the entire agenda.

eagle.cocoa: You are the Gwaihir of your friend group — showing up exactly when you are needed, lifting people out of their lowest moments, and wrapping it all in genuine warmth. Cocoa tells us you want your heroism to feel like home: dependable, comforting, and never showy. In love, you are the partner who makes people feel safe enough to be fully themselves, which is arguably the rarest gift in all of Middle-earth. Professionally, you thrive in roles where your broad perspective and quiet dependability allow you to see what others miss entirely.
eagle.cocoa with marshmallows: Like the Great Eagles soaring over the Misty Mountains with a flair for the dramatic rescue, you know how to make an entrance — and you bring the marshmallows. You are the person who elevates every ordinary moment into something worth remembering, from a Tuesday evening to the slopes of Mount Doom. Partners adore you because your joy is genuinely contagious and your care is abundant and unguarded. In your career, you are the team member who improves morale simply by being present, and whose creative ideas tend to actually work.
eagle.broth: Eagle and chicken broth is the combination of the healer and the guardian — you are the person who flies into the storm specifically to bring someone home safe, then sits with them while they recover. Like Landroval carrying the wounded from the Black Gate, your instinct is always toward restoration and care. Romantically, you are exceptionally attentive to your partner's needs and possess a rare ability to nourish without smothering. In your professional life, you are drawn to work with genuine purpose, and your colleagues trust you instinctively because you have never once let them down.
eagle.black coffee: You carry the ancient, unsentimental clarity of Thorondor — the oldest and greatest of the Eagles, who answered to no one and saw everything from his unassailable height. Black coffee confirms it: you have no patience for pretense, and your perspective from altitude means you see solutions others are still searching for. In relationships, you are fiercely devoted but you need a partner who respects your independence as much as you respect theirs. Professionally, you are the person who makes the hard call correctly, the first time, and never needs to explain why.
eagle.caffe latte: You combine the Great Eagles' noble bearing with a genuine delight in the pleasures of the world — you are elevated, but never cold, much like the warm thermals that carry Gwaihir over the peaks of the Misty Mountains. The latte tells us you believe that excellence and comfort are not opposites; you pursue mastery without sacrificing joy. In love, you are the partner who plans the beautiful trip AND remembers to pack the good coffee. At work, your colleagues aspire to your standards because you make high achievement look genuinely appealing.
eagle.hot water: There is a profound, wind-scoured clarity about you — the kind that comes from spending time at great heights where only the essential survives, like the eyries above Gondolin. Hot water is the drink of someone who has already distilled themselves down to what matters, and you carry that quiet authority into every room you enter. In romance, you are a still center for your partner, the eye of whatever storm they are navigating. Professionally, you are the advisor or mentor whose counsel is sought precisely because it is never cluttered with ego.

warg.cocoa: You are wild at heart but with an undeniable appetite for comfort, like a warg who has claimed the best spot by the fire and dares anyone to argue about it. The cocoa reveals the loyalty beneath the fierce exterior — once you have chosen your pack, you are unshakeable in your devotion and absolutely formidable in their defense. Romantically, you are the partner who shows love through fierce protectiveness and absolute presence, never halfway in anything. At work, you are the team member who brings raw drive and genuine camaraderie, the one people want beside them when the stakes are high.
warg.cocoa with marshmallows: You have the warg's untamed spirit and the heart of someone who genuinely believes life should include small, delightful things — and those marshmallows are non-negotiable. Like the wargs of the Misty Mountains who ran in joyful, chaotic packs, you thrive in the company of people who match your energy and appreciate your enthusiasm for the full experience of being alive. Partners find you magnetic because your passion is completely authentic and your capacity for fun is bottomless. In your career, you are the person who gets things done and somehow makes the doing of them memorable.
warg.broth: Beneath the warg's fierce reputation is a pack animal who knows that survival depends on taking care of one another, and chicken broth is the distillation of exactly that instinct. You are the person who shows up with soup when someone is sick, who remembers what everyone needs before they ask, and who holds the group together through sheer force of practical love. In romance, you are nurturing and intensely loyal, the kind of partner who makes your person feel genuinely sheltered from the world. Professionally, you excel in team environments where your ability to read the room and tend to morale makes everyone around you perform better.
warg.black coffee: You are warg energy in its purest, most unvarnished form — direct, powerful, utterly without pretense, like the great wargs who needed no rider to be dangerous. Black coffee confirms you are not interested in softening yourself for anyone's comfort, and that honesty is, paradoxically, one of your most compelling qualities. In relationships, you attract partners who are secure enough to appreciate a love that is fierce and unadorned rather than decorated with performance. Professionally, you cut through noise faster than anyone in the room, and the results you deliver speak so clearly that nobody asks for elaboration.
warg.caffe latte: You carry the warg's primal confidence and have paired it with a hard-won appreciation for the good life — the untamed spirit who also knows exactly which café makes the best cup. Like the alliance between wargs and the more ambitious inhabitants of Middle-earth, you understand that power is even more effective when it comes wrapped in polish and presence. Romantically, you are intensely passionate and surprisingly attentive, a combination your partner finds completely irresistible. In your career, you are the natural leader who earns loyalty through both competence and the sheer force of your personality.
warg.hot water: There is a stripped-down, primal honesty to you that cuts through every layer of social performance, like a warg running silent across snow-covered ground with total purposeful economy of movement. Hot water is the choice that says you know exactly what you are and require no external definition — your identity is not borrowed from trends or approval. In love, you are steady and genuine, the partner who is simply and completely there, which is rarer and more valuable than most people realize. Professionally, your colleagues respect you because what you project is exactly what you deliver, without embellishment and without fail.

giant spider.cocoa: You have a rich, enveloping warmth that catches people off guard — much like Shelob's lair, you seem forbidding from the outside but reward those brave enough to enter with an unexpectedly cozy interior. You are patient, strategic, and deeply loyal to your inner circle, weaving connections with care and precision. In romance, you attract partners who appreciate your intense focus and protective instincts; you love deeply and expect the same in return. Professionally, you thrive in roles that require quiet persistence and big-picture thinking — the web you build always has a purpose.
giant spider.cocoa with marshmallows: Like Ungoliant herself, who swallowed the light of the Two Trees and still hungered for more, you have an appetite for life's sweetest comforts — and you are utterly unashamed of it. You bring a surprisingly playful, indulgent energy to every room, turning even the darkest tunnels of Nan Dungortheb into a cozy hangout. Romantically, you are generous and a little dramatic, showering the people you love with warmth and small delights. At work, you are the one who remembers everyone's birthday and makes the break room feel like a destination.
giant spider.broth: You are the quiet sustainer — the one who shows up with exactly what's needed before anyone thinks to ask, as steady and purposeful as the great spiders who held dominion over Mirkwood for ages uncounted. There's a no-nonsense practicality to you, a preference for nourishment over flash, for substance over spectacle. In love, you are the partner who keeps the household running and notices when something is off before a word is spoken. Your professional superpower is crisis management: when everything unravels, you are already three steps ahead, spinning a new plan.
giant spider.black coffee: Shelob needed no sweetness and no company — just singular, driven purpose — and neither do you. You move through the world with an intensity that commands respect, your focus as unwavering as a spider's silk under tension. Romantically, you are drawn to equals: ambitious, self-possessed people who don't need you to hold their hand but genuinely want you by their side. In your career, you excel wherever the stakes are high and the hours are long, finding a quiet satisfaction in mastery that others might mistake for severity.
giant spider.caffe latte: You have the ancient, formidable power of the great spiders balanced with a thoroughly modern appreciation for craft and comfort — you are the one who researches the best pour-over technique with the same methodical care Ungoliant brought to consuming the Silmarils. You are sophisticated without being unapproachable, and people are consistently surprised by how warm and funny you are beneath the self-possessed exterior. In romance, you value intellectual chemistry and shared rituals — a morning coffee together is, for you, a form of intimacy. Professionally, you are drawn to creative or analytical fields where precision and aesthetic sensibility both matter.
giant spider.hot water: There is a zen-like economy to you that echoes the elemental patience of the ancient spiders of Arda — you need very little to be content, and that freedom makes you formidable. You strip everything down to essentials, seeing through complexity with an ease that baffles people who over-complicate their lives. Romantically, you are deeply present with those you choose to let close, and your calm centeredness makes you a stabilizing force in any relationship. At work, you are the person who asks the one question that reframes the entire problem.

valar.cocoa: You carry the warmth of Yavanna's forests and the hearth-light of Aulë's forges wherever you go — a person of grand vision who nonetheless finds genuine joy in small, sensory pleasures. Like the Valar who shaped the world with both cosmic ambition and tender care, you move between the epic and the intimate without losing your footing in either. In romance, you are a devoted and imaginative partner, the kind who plans something unforgettable and also remembers that sometimes sitting quietly together is enough. Professionally, you are a builder and a nurturer, drawn to work that leaves something beautiful behind.
valar.cocoa with marshmallows: Nessa dances on the fields of Valinor for the sheer joy of it, and you understand her completely — you have the same capacity to hold immense power lightly and find delight in the uncomplicated and sweet. You bring a festive, generous energy to everything you do, and people orbit you the way the stars of Varda orbit the eternal dark: naturally, gratefully, unable to imagine the sky without you. Romantically, you are exuberant and devoted, a gift-giver and a celebrant who turns ordinary evenings into occasions. At work, you raise morale effortlessly and have an almost Ulmo-like ability to move through every level of an organization.
valar.broth: Like Nienna, who weeps for the sorrows of Arda and whose tears bring wisdom and healing, you understand that the most profound care is often the quietest kind. You show up in practical, sustaining ways — less interested in grand gestures than in making sure the people you love are actually all right. In romance, you are steady and perceptive, a partner who asks the right questions and listens to the answers as carefully as Manwë listens to the winds of the world. Your professional gifts lie in leadership, counseling, and any role where your ability to read the room and respond with exactly the right thing makes all the difference.
valar.black coffee: Manwë did not rule Arda by being accommodating — he held the highest seat because his vision was clearest, his will the most resolute, and you share that uncompromising clarity of purpose. You drink your coffee the way the Valar made the world: no embellishments, just the essential thing, done right. Romantically, you are drawn to people of genuine substance and are refreshingly honest about what you want; partners know exactly where they stand, which is either the beginning or the end of a very short conversation. In your career, you are the one others look to when the decision is hard and the stakes are real.
valar.caffe latte: You have the artisan's soul of Aulë — who crafted the Dwarves out of sheer creative longing — combined with a genuine appreciation for the pleasures of the well-made thing. You are drawn to beauty, craft, and the kind of warmth that's been designed with intention, and you bring that same care to everything you do. In romance, you are attentive and expressive, the partner who curates experiences and remembers what makes the other person light up. Professionally, you move comfortably between vision and execution, equally at home sketching the grand plan and refining the smallest details.
valar.hot water: There is something of Ilúvatar's own patience in you — the capacity to hold space, to wait, to find sufficiency in pure, unadorned presence, which is a rarer and more powerful gift than it sounds. Like the Valar before the Music of the Ainur, you carry within you a deep reservoir of potential that doesn't need external stimulus to be meaningful. Romantically, you offer a kind of serenity that partners find quietly irresistible — you are the still point that makes everything around you feel more real. In your work, you have an almost uncanny ability to cut through noise and attend to what actually matters.

mearas.cocoa: You are warmth in motion — someone who moves through life with quiet grace but carries an inner fire that surprises everyone who gets close. Like Shadowfax galloping across the Pelennor Fields, you know exactly when to show up, and you always do. In relationships, you're the partner who brings the blanket and remembers exactly how the other person takes their drink. Professionally, you inspire trust without demanding it, which means people keep giving you more responsibility than you technically asked for.
mearas.cocoa with marshmallows: You are the unbridled joy that the plains of Rohan were made for — free-spirited, a little extra, and absolutely magnificent about it. Shadowfax himself would probably appreciate the marshmallows, because why be the Lord of All Horses without a little flourish? Your romantic energy is generous and playful; you make grand gestures feel natural rather than overwhelming. At work, you're the one who decorates the office for every minor occasion and somehow makes everyone genuinely look forward to Tuesday.
mearas.broth: You are steady, restorative, and quietly essential — the kind of person who shows up with exactly what's needed before anyone thought to ask. The Mearas weren't flashy; they were dependable at a level that bordered on supernatural, and so are you. In love, you're the long-game partner: not the most dramatic, but the one still standing when the drama clears. Your professional superpower is that people always come to you when things get complicated, because you make difficult things feel manageable.
mearas.black coffee: You are the grey pilgrim's horse and the grey pilgrim's beverage: no frills, no apologies, and quietly awe-inspiring once people realise what they're dealing with. Shadowfax answered to no one but Gandalf, and you operate on a similar principle — respect is earned, not assumed. Romantically, you're a slow burn; partners who stick around discover extraordinary loyalty and depth beneath the no-nonsense exterior. In your career, you cut straight to what matters, which unsettles mediocre colleagues and makes exceptional ones want to follow you anywhere.
mearas.caffe latte: You carry yourself with the easy confidence of a Mearas who knows exactly how good they are but doesn't need to make a point of it — smooth, warm, and just refined enough to make an impression. Like Théoden riding out of Edoras with his head finally clear, you bring clarity and energy to everyone around you. In relationships, you're effortlessly attentive: you remember the small things, you make people feel seen, and you look good doing all of it. Professionally, you thrive in roles that call for both vision and polish, and your presence tends to raise the standard of every room you enter.
mearas.hot water: You are pure potential held in elegant restraint — like a Mearas standing still on a hillside, you don't need to perform to command attention. There is something deeply intentional about you; you strip away what isn't necessary and find that what remains is exactly enough. Romantically, you attract people who are perceptive enough to recognise substance over spectacle, and those are the only people you were interested in anyway. At work, you are the still point in every storm, the colleague who asks the one clarifying question that dissolves an hour of circular argument.

sauron.cocoa: You have the soul of a grand architect — someone who sees the world not as it is but as it could be, perfectly ordered and magnificent. Like Sauron in his Annatar days, you know how to make a gift feel generous even when it comes with strings attached, and people are drawn to your warmth and vision. In romance, you are devoted and intense; your partner will never doubt that they are the centre of your world, for better or worse. Professionally, you thrive in long-game strategy, and your colleagues quietly suspect you have a ten-thousand-year plan they haven't been briefed on yet.
sauron.cocoa with marshmallows: You believe that true power should be comfortable, and you see no contradiction between ruling absolutely and having lovely things. Sauron himself once moved in the highest circles of the Valar, and you carry that same sense that you belong at the finest tables — with the best toppings. Romantically, you are indulgent and a little addictive; people fall for you quickly and find it surprisingly hard to give you back. Your professional superpower is that you make even the most audacious demands seem reasonable, wrapped as they are in such appealing packaging.
sauron.broth: Beneath the iron will and the flaming eye, there is something ancient and sustaining about you — a person who has seen civilisations rise and fall and still shows up, still nourishing, still essential. Like the forging of the rings of power, you put yourself into everything you create, and your work carries a warmth people can feel without quite knowing why. In love, you are the steady presence that rebuilds someone after a hard season; you are not flashy, but you are irreplaceable. Professionally, you are the one everyone turns to in a crisis, because you have been in worse situations and you already know the way through.
sauron.black coffee: You are the undiluted version — no apologies, no softening, no decorative flourishes between you and what you want. Sauron did not build Barad-dûr by asking nicely, and you have the same concentrated focus that turns impossible ambitions into done deals. Romantically, you are magnetic precisely because you do not perform: what you offer is real, and the people who can match your intensity find you utterly electrifying. In your career, you are the one drafting the vision while everyone else is still waking up, the architect of plans so complete that others simply step into the structure you have already built.
sauron.caffe latte: You have mastered the art of being formidable and approachable at the same time, a combination that is rarer and more powerful than people realise. Like Annatar the gift-giver, you walk into rooms and make everyone feel that your attention is the thing they have been waiting for — and you are not entirely wrong. In relationships, you are romantic and a little theatrical, the sort of partner who makes ordinary evenings feel like a grand occasion worth remembering. Professionally, you excel at persuasion and coalition-building, getting people to sign on to your vision so enthusiastically that they forget the idea was yours in the first place.
sauron.hot water: You are the purest expression of potential — unadorned, scalding, and absolutely foundational to everything else. There is something of Sauron's earliest Maia nature in you, a power that existed before it was shaped into any particular form, vast and quietly terrifying. In love, you are transformative: people who get close to you find themselves changed, refined, made into something they could not have been without the heat of your presence. Your professional gift is that you strip every situation down to its essential truth, and in a world full of noise and ornamentation, that clarity is the most commanding force in any room.
